subject: chore(examples): implement e-commerce demo mobile design (#3866)
body:
* chore(examples): update e-commerce demo on mobile

* chore(examples): convert `cssClasses` to raw CSS specs (#3868)

Using our raw CSS classes specs is easier to then port the theme to other flavors without having to deal with the class mapping.

* chore(examples): add empty results design to e-commerce demo (#3894)
